title: berkheya onobromoides
intro: Berkheya onobromoides, also known as the Green Jade Daisy or White Daisies, is a flowering plant species native to the southern parts of Africa. The medicinal properties of Berkheya onobromoides lie in its roots, which contain various bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and serve as an expectorant to clear mucus from the lungs. The herbal preparations for Berkheya onobromoides typically involve drying the roots and leaves to create teas or infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
